title: 2x Jumbo Gift Bag Christmas Xmas Presents Extra Large Novelty Santa Red Set
features: SIZE: Each bag measures: 67x49x16cm. Material: polypropylene non-woven fabric.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The pack includes two Extra Large Christmas Gift Bags in two assorted designs.

CHRISTMAS PRESENTS: This Christmas add an elegant touch to the gift-giving tradition with this set of 2 Jumbo Gift Bags. Surprise your loved ones and wrap your present in style. These beautiful, extra-large bags will look stunning under the Christmas tree.

TWO FESTIVE DESIGNS: The bags come in two assorted designs. One of the bags features an animated Santa design, surrounded by cute reindeer, penguin and presents on a red background with a 'Merry Christmas' words. The second bag features a classic design of a Santa with 'Merry Christmas' words on a red base. Made from strong polypropylene non-woven fabric these Christmas bags are very durable and strong. Featuring wipe clean surface the bag is easy to clean and maintain.

ELEGANT GIFT WRAPPING: Using a gift bag when wrapping your presents saves you time, energy and money. The bags are reusable, so you can use them again next year. Each bag features a handle for easy-carry, and its extra-large size will come very handy for Christmas. This set of 2 is a must-have addition for Christmas celebrations.
